meta.title: Author Matt Ridley on "How Innovation Works: And Why It Flourishes in Freedom"
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Matt Ridley, an award-winning author and member of the House of Lords, on his new book, “How Innovation Works: And Why It Flourishes in Freedom.” In the book, Ridley couples case studies with economic and historical analysis to argue why innovation flourishes in free societies.
